title: After 46 years working, I’m not retiring — instead, I take a vacation every month. Is that a good life in your 70s?
author: Quentin Fottrell
fullText: “I’ve owned my own company for the last 15 years. It’s worth $8.5 million.”
summary: “I’ve owned my own company for the last 15 years. It’s worth $8.5 million.”
